ns1:SendMessage.ns1:request: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <TransferMessage xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/messaging/v1"> <Header><EnforcementAgentType><EnforcementAgentRegNum>889</EnforcementAgentRegNum><EnforcementAgentName>Деница Йорданова Станчева</EnforcementAgentName></EnforcementAgentType><TransferDate>2024-04-11T15:56:38+03:00</TransferDate><TransferGUID>{ba821892-8548-49e7-a8e1-4a44fbcdcab2}</TransferGUID></Header><Body><TransferData><IncomingReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><OutgoingReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><CasesReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><ActionReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"><ActionRegDetails xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0004"><ActionDate>2018-12-22T00:00:00+02:00</ActionDate><ActionNumber>1</ActionNumber><CaseNum>20188890401352</CaseNum><CaseDate>2018-06-06</CaseDate><LiableSubject><Person xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/0001"><Name>ДИМИТЪР МИТКОВ ПЕТРОВ</Name><Identifier><EGN/></Identifier><Address/></Person></LiableSubject><ActionTypeID>0</ActionTypeID><Description>връчване призовкар Уведомление Залепен на вратата.</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails><ActionRegDetails xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0004"><ActionDate>2018-12-22T00:00:00+02:00</ActionDate><ActionNumber>2</ActionNumber><CaseNum>20188890400195</CaseNum><CaseDate>2018-01-29</CaseDate><LiableSubject><Person xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/0001"><Name>ВАЛЕРИ ЗАПРИНОВ ШОПОВ</Name><Identifier><EGN/></Identifier><Address/></Person></LiableSubject><ActionTypeID>0</ActionTypeID><Description>връчване призовкар ППИ-ОПИС НА ДВ. ВЕЩИ Връчен на член на семейството</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails></ActionReg></TransferData></Body></TransferMessage>
